groups.name: Detection Probes
groups.notes: Start with single quote. Error message OR time delay = likely injectable.

groups.name: Union-Based
groups.notes: Find column count with ORDER BY first. All NULLs until you find data types.

groups.name: Blind Boolean
groups.notes: Compare true vs false page responses. Automate with SQLMap --technique=B

groups.name: Time-Based Blind
items: '; SELECT CASE WHEN(1=1) THEN sleep(5) ELSE 0 END-- (MySQL)
'; SELECT 1 FROM dual WHERE 1=1 AND sleep(5)-- (Oracle)
groups.notes: Response > 5s = vulnerable. Use --technique=T in SQLMap for automation.

groups.name: Authentication Bypass
groups.notes: Login form bypass. Try in both username and password fields. Check for second-order injection too.

groups.name: Basic Probes
groups.notes: Replace alert(1) with alert(document.domain) to prove same-origin execution. Show scope of impact.

groups.name: Attribute Context
groups.notes: Breaking out of HTML attribute context. Must terminate the attribute value first.

groups.name: DOM-Based
groups.notes: Check JavaScript that reads location.hash, document.URL, document.referrer. Source → Sink analysis in Burp.

groups.name: Filter Bypass
groups.notes: WAF evasion. Use Burp Intruder + XSS payload list from SecLists. Check server-side encoding before output.

groups.name: Internal Network
groups.notes: Probe for internal services behind firewall. Common targets: admin panels, monitoring, databases.

groups.name: Cloud Metadata (Critical)
groups.notes: AWS metadata = IAM credentials = account takeover. Add header: Metadata-Flavor: Google for GCP.

groups.name: Protocol Schemes
groups.notes: Try when http:// is blocked. file:// reads local files. gopher:// can send raw TCP to internal services.

groups.name: Basic Traversal
groups.notes: Double encoding bypasses simple filters. Count directory depth needed. Linux: /etc/passwd. Windows: C:\Windows\win.ini

groups.name: High-Value Files
groups.notes: After confirming LFI, immediately go for /proc/self/environ (may contain secrets) and application config files.

groups.name: PHP Wrappers
groups.notes: php://filter reads source code as base64 without executing. data:// can lead to RCE if phar deserialization available.

groups.name: Injection Separators
groups.notes: Try all separators. Behavior varies by OS and shell. Use Burp Repeater to test each manually.

groups.name: Blind Detection
groups.notes: Use Burp Collaborator for out-of-band detection. Time-based: compare baseline vs sleep response time.

groups.name: Filter Bypass
groups.notes: When spaces or keywords are filtered. Use ${IFS} for spaces. Concatenation to bypass keyword filters.

groups.name: Default Credentials
groups.notes: Always try defaults on every login. Internal systems, network gear, dev environments almost never change defaults.

groups.name: JWT Attacks
items: Change alg from RS256 to HS256 — sign with public key
groups.notes: Use jwt_tool: python3 jwt_tool.py {TOKEN} -T (tamper) or -C -d wordlist.txt (crack). None algorithm = no auth.
